name: JWD InfoLogistics Public Company Limited
summary: JWD InfoLogistics Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the integrated in-land and oversea logistics business in Thailand, Taiwan, the United States, Laos, Cambodia, Myanmar, Vietnam, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, and internationally. The company operates through six segments: Integrated Logistics, Supply Chain and Warehouse Management; Transportation Services; Domestic and International Removal; Record and Information Storage; Foods; and Others. It offers general warehousing, chemical and dangerous goods warehousing, automotive parts warehousing and yard management, chilled and frozen temperature controlled warehousing, and document storage, custom clearance, e-commerce logistics, relocation, and transportation and distribution management consultancy, as well as logistics software development services; and other value added services. The company also develops and manages office and warehouse properties; provides investment consultation, and warehouse management services; and offers property management services, including facility, financial, environment and power, and safety management, as well as building inspection and fire exercise services. In addition, it offers household, factory, office, and fine arts and exhibition items removal services; self-storage services; record and information management services; and information technology solutions for supply chain management. Further, the company provides buildings and other construction facilities rental, moving, land rental, port, carriage, goods packing and handling, cargo container, cold storage, and art storage services; sells temperature controlled equipment; and sells and installs electronics devices, software applications, and network services. It primarily serves customers in automotive and parts, chemicals and dangerous goods, and food and cold chain sectors. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
